response.justification: Bogdan shows extensive technical breadth and leadership in software engineering, with deep experience in distributed systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and experimentation tooling. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of working on large-scale experimentation/measurement platforms or statistical experimentation systems, which are core to this role. His experience with low-latency systems (e.g., Sociomantic) and AI tools (e.g., MCP) is highly relevant, but his focus seems more aligned with general software development than growth experimentation systems.
strengths: Strong distributed systems experience with low-latency and high-throughput applications (e.g., Sociomantic, re:cinq).
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Hands-on experience with AI tooling (MCP, AI-agent infrastructure) and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, or statistical bias detection in growth contexts.
Limited evidence of working at enterprise scale (multi-region, globally distributed systems) for experimentation or measurement purposes.
Resume emphasizes breadth over depth in experimentation systems; core responsibilities of the role may not align closely with his past work.
